title: sorghum tenerum
intro: Sorghum tenerum, also known as sweet sorghum, is a type of drought-tolerant perennial plant native to Africa and Asia, belonging to the Sorghum genus. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of sorghum tenerum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, among others. Herbal preparations of sorghum tenerum can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and skin problems.
